g.text: M1 | wal-impl-m1 | Log Record Format & Transaction API
M2 | wal-impl-m2 | Log Writer with Group Commit
M3 | wal-impl-m3 | ARIES Crash Recovery with CLRs
M4 | wal-impl-m4 | Fuzzy Checkpointing & Log Truncation

div.p: Invariant: prev_lsn points to previous record of the SAME transaction, not the previous record in the log.

g.text: LSN N -> seek to offset N
Wrong: undo T1 first, then T2

p.strong: Undo uses max-heap ordered by LSN

g.text: UPDATE: update last_lsn, add page to DPT
CLR: update last_lsn, add page to DPT

ul.li: Dirty Page Table: pages needing redo

g.text: If page not in DPT: skip

div.p: Running redo N times = same result

g.text: Rule 2: No active txn first_lsn in segment
